title: fcb configuration
description: Configuration for the fcb FOCUS-schema cost browser.

source_files.description: Parquet files (FOCUS exports) to read and merge.

excluded_fields.description: Fields to omit from the output. Mutually exclusive with included_fields.

included_fields.description: Only these fields are kept in the output. Mutually exclusive with excluded_fields.

not.description: excluded_fields and included_fields are mutually exclusive.
